title: Cold Open: A World Without Hunters
prompt: A wide tracking shot drifting low across the Cambrian seafloor at dawn. Trilobites graze peacefully on a mat of microbial film. Soft god-rays through the water. Nothing flees. Nothing hides. The camera lingers as if eavesdropping on a moment that is about to end.
narration: For three billion years, life on Earth was peaceful. There were no teeth. No claws. No reason to run. And then, something changed.
audioText: For three billion years, life on Earth was peaceful. There were no teeth. No claws. No reason to run. And then, something changed.
